holdings.infoBox: ULTY is an equity ETF with a total of 114 individual holdings. The top holdings are Palantir Technologies stock at 6.25%, Astera Labs at 5.30%, Fortinet at 5.12%, Lam Research at 4.89%, and Coherent at 4.59%.

overview.description: The YieldMax Ultra Option Income Strategy ETF (ULTY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking to provide monthly income through a portfolio of covered call strategies. The fund generates income via option premiums, dividends from directly held US stocks, and US treasuries ULTY was launched on Feb 28, 2024 and is issued by YieldMax.
